mapper.sql: m.id, m.medicine_code, m.medicine_name, m.category_id, c.category_name, m.specification, m.unit, m.manufacturer, m.supplier_id, s.supplier_name, m.purchase_price, m.sale_price, m.safe_stock, m.expiry_warning_days, m.is_controlled, m.status, m.remark, m.created_at, m.updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM medicine m INNER JOIN medicine_category c ON m.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN supplier s ON m.supplier_id = s.id WHERE m.id = #{id}
SELECT * FROM medicine WHERE medicine_code = #{medicineCode} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE medicine SET medicine_name = #{medicineName}, category_id = #{categoryId}, specification = #{specification}, unit = #{unit}, manufacturer = #{manufacturer}, supplier_id = #{supplierId}, purchase_price = #{purchasePrice}, sale_price = #{salePrice}, safe_stock = #{safeStock}, expiry_warning_days = #{expiryWarningDays}, is_controlled = #{isControlled}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
